spacing_and_layout.kanban_board: Fluid drag-and-drop layout. Use flex-nowrap or grid with overflow-x-auto. Apply gap-4 between columns, gap-3 between cards. Columns should have min-width 300px.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6. Use dense, compact spacing inside widgets (p-4 or p-5) to optimize data display.
spacing_and_layout.surface: Flat solid surfaces. Avoid glassmorphism for heavy data apps to maintain clarity. Max border-radius: 8px (rounded-lg). Use 1px subtle border (border-zinc-200). Shadows should be minimal (shadow-sm only on hover).

components.kanban_card: Minimalist card design. Show lead name, interested course, priority indicator, and last contact date. Implement 'Contextual Pop' (Sheet or Dialog) on click to reveal deep details without leaving the board.
components.whatsapp_panel: Split view interface: Contact info on the left, chat stream on the right. Chat bubbles should use distinct background colors (e.g., info_bg for sent, background.tertiary for received). Bottom composer with template dropdown.
components.ai_caller_panel: Command-center aesthetic. Design a specific modal or dedicated panel for the AI caller. Incorporate a 'Call Active' pulse animation (green ring) and a live scrolling transcript feed. Include a toggle for Language (Hindi/English).
components.charts: Use Recharts wrapped in Shadcn. Stick to monochromatic tones of the primary brand color or distinct status colors. Tooltips must be accessible and fast.
components.buttons: Primary: Solid bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700 rounded-md. Secondary: outline border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900. Action buttons inside Kanban cards should be icon-only on hover to save space.

animations.hover: Subtle transform scale-[1.02] transition-transform duration-200 for Kanban cards.
animations.transitions: Smooth opacity and transform on modal/sheet entrances.
animations.ai_pulse: animate-pulse for active call status indicator.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure 4.5:1 ratio for all text on colored backgrounds, especially inside status tags (use dark text on light backgrounds for tags).
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='kanban-column-new', data-testid='send-whatsapp-btn').

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5. Sizes: 16px (w-4 h-4) in buttons/tags and 20px-24px (w-5 h-5 / w-6 h-6) in sidebar navigation.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a CRM layout with a persistent left sidebar for navigation (Dashboard, Pipeline, Analytics) and a top header for search and user actions.
Implement the Kanban pipeline with robust state management. Columns: New, Contacted, Interested, Demo Scheduled, Negotiation, Enrolled, Lost. Keep headers sticky and show counts.
For the AI Caller feature, mock a detailed interface containing a live transcription area, a language selector (Hindi/English), script preview, and call status.
For the WhatsApp Composer, build a chat interface with a predefined message templates dropdown.
Use 'Manrope' from Google Fonts for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add them to index.html or layout wrapper.
Ensure all Shadcn components (cards, buttons, dialogs) are stripped of excessive border radius (max 8px) and rely on 1px borders instead of drop shadows.
CRITICAL: Add 'data-testid' to every interactive element (buttons, tabs, cards, inputs) for testing purposes.
